title: Google Ads Copy Generator
description: Generate headlines and descriptions tailored to each client's tone of voice with character limit checks.

title: Content Generator
description: Location pages, blog posts, batch generation, Drive integration, auto-tracking sheets, formatted Google Docs.

title: API Usage Dashboard
description: Track Claude API spend per tool, per client, with daily chart on the homepage.

title: Roadmap Tracker
description: Drag-and-drop board to track tool ideas from Planned to Done.

title: Email Digest
description: Morning email briefing. Summarise unread client emails and draft replies in Laurence's voice.

title: Meta Title & Description Generator
description: Bulk generate meta titles (60 char) and descriptions (155 char) from a sitemap URL. Flag missing or too-long ones.

title: Google Business Profile Post Writer
description: Generate weekly GBP posts per client with CTA and image suggestion. Publish directly via GBP API.

title: Social Media Post Generator + Scheduler
description: Generate posts and publish/schedule to Facebook and Instagram via Meta Graph API.

title: Facebook Ads Lead Downloader
description: Auto-download leads from Facebook Ads Manager. Notify or push to a sheet instead of manually checking every few days.

title: Keyword Clustering Tool
description: Paste keywords from SEMrush/Ahrefs. Claude groups them into page-level clusters and suggests target pages.

title: Google Search Console Integration
description: Pull keyword rankings, clicks, impressions per page per client. Feed into reports and content decisions.

title: Google Analytics (GA4) Integration
description: Pull traffic and conversion data per client for reporting.

title: Monthly Report Generator
description: Pull from tracking sheets and analytics, auto-write narrative. Laurence adds stats manually.

title: Competitor Content Gap Finder
description: Input competitor URL, scrape their pages, compare against client's content, suggest missing topics.

title: Internal Linking Suggester
description: For a given page, scan client's existing content and suggest where internal links should be added.

title: Schema Markup Generator
description: Select client + page type (local business, FAQ, service), generate JSON-LD structured data.

title: Alt Text Generator
description: Upload or link images, generate SEO-friendly alt text in the client's tone.

title: Trello Integration
description: Create Trello cards for VA when content is generated. Card includes doc link, page title, URL slug.
